name: DACC
description: DACC is a place to play pickleball in Danville, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Fee required — $5 to play or if you have a membership it’s included
